# National Financial Ombud Scheme — OBSSA amalgamation

## What the site says

Under LAW_SECTIONS Chargebacks, the site notes: *"National Financial Ombud Scheme (NFO) — banking division. 0860 800 900 · nfosa.co.za. (OBSSA amalgamated into NFO on 1 March 2024.)"*

## Notes

The OBSSA (Ombudsman for Banking Services) amalgamated into the NFO on 1 March 2024. The amalgamation scope was broader than just OBSSA — three other schemes (Credit Ombud, OLTI, OSTI) were also consolidated, leaving the FAIS Ombud separate. A future site refresh could add the full amalgamation scope; the current claim is accurate but incomplete.

Full details not yet mirrored.
